title: Fix HubSpot Trademark Capitalization in Settings
story: As a DataTools Pro user viewing the settings page, I want to see 'HubSpot' spelled correctly with proper capitalization so that the application reflects accurate trademark compliance.
description: Fix the display of 'hubspot' in the settings navigation and page to use the correct trademark capitalization 'HubSpot' (capital H and capital S). This ensures compliance with HubSpot's brand guidelines.
acceptance_criteria: Settings navigation shows 'HubSpot' with correct capitalization
HubSpot settings page title uses correct capitalization
All references to HubSpot in the UI use the correct trademark format
ux_changes: Updated all UI references from 'hubspot' to 'HubSpot' to comply with trademark capitalization requirements.
implementation_notes: Simple text label fix across the settings UI to match HubSpot's official trademark capitalization.
comment_summary: Developer requested clarification, then fixed the capitalization on the development environment.
